segments.text: But know this, that in the last days perilous times will come:
For men will be:
lovers of themselves, lovers of money, boasters, proud, blasphemers, disobedient to parents, unthankful, unholy
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: unloving, unforgiving, slanderers, without self-control, brutal, despisers of good
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: traitors, headstrong, haughty, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: having a form of godliness but denying its power.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: And from such people turn away!
For of this sort are those who creep into households and make captives of gullible women loaded down with sins, led away by various lusts,
always learning and never able to come to the knowledge of the truth.
Now as Jannes and Jambres resisted Moses, so do these also resist the truth:
men of corrupt minds, disapproved concerning the faith
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: but they will progress no further, for their folly will be manifest to all, as theirs also was.

verses.title: The Man of God and the Word of God

segments.text: But you have carefully followed:
my doctrine, manner of life, purpose, faith, longsuffering, love, perseverance
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: persecutions, afflictions, which happened to me at Antioch, at Iconium, at Lystra—what persecutions I endured.
And out of them all the Lord delivered me.
Yes, and all who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will suffer persecution.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But evil men and impostors will grow worse and worse, deceiving and being deceived.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But you must continue in the things which you have learned and been assured of, knowing from whom you have learned them
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: and that from childhood you have known the Holy Scriptures, which are able to make you wise for salvation through faith which is in Christ Jesus.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: All Scripture is given by inspiration of God, and is profitable for doctrine, for reproof, for correction, for instruction in righteousness
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: that the man of God may be complete, thoroughly equipped for every good work.
segments.speaker: Paul
